comment: Synthetic Linear issue node exercising both relation directions. AIO-100 is blocked by AIO-200 (an inverseRelation of type 'blocks' whose relation.issue is the blocker AIO-200, still unstarted) and itself blocks AIO-300 (a relation of type 'blocks' whose relatedIssue is AIO-300). Only AIO-200 is a real blocker of AIO-100.
title: A downstream task
